response:
KEEP THE AREA CLEAN: BRUSH GENTLY AND THOROUGHLY. RINSE MOUTH WITH WATER AFTER MEALS. CLEAN TOOTH TO PREVENT INFECTION. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION*  
* * *  
USE TEMPORARY FILLING MATERIALS: APPLY OVER-THE-COUNTER FILLING. FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY. PROTECT TOOTH FROM FURTHER DAMAGE. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION*  
* * *  
AVOID CERTAIN FOODS: STAY AWAY FROM HARD OR STICKY FOODS. CHOOSE SOFT OPTIONS TO PREVENT PAIN. MAINTAIN GOOD ORAL HYGIENE. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION*  
* * *  
MONITOR FOR CHANGES: CHECK FOR PAIN OR SWELLING. LOOK FOR BAD TASTE OR FEVER. SEEK DENTAL CARE AS SOON AS POSSIBLE.  
BOX TOOTH TO PREVENT FURTHER DAMAGE. CAR TO TRANSPORT TO DENTIST. TRADITION OF GOOD ORAL HYGIENE. TWO SCHEDULED VISITS TO DENTIST.
